PROP-01b-partial2-inv-011.text: Failed external calls in _call must always revert, never return silently.
PROP-01b-partial2-inv-011.assertion: forall _call(target, data): success == false => revert (never return empty)

locations.note: success==false: bubbles response if length>0, else reverts LowLevelCallFailed at lines 30-40
